rationale: Reuses existing gate-driving test scaffolding and yields the concrete AC #1 reproduction; Option B's request.config.rootpath re-anchor has zero precedent and per BUG-2649 would not change behavior. Time-boxed, with B as fallback.
rule: Option A — Repro-then-fix: build a fixed-repeat stress harness in TestVerifyEpicBranchBeforeMerge to reproduce the doc-wiring flake before removing the LL_VERIFY_GATE quarantine
alternatives_rejected: Option B — Prove-cannot-recur + defensive fix (re-anchor project_root to request.config.rootpath and/or add settle-check, then remove quarantine)
